title: Config from Environment
description:
Welcome to Rank Challenge. This module hardcodes the server port as `3000`. Hardcoded config can't change between environments and may leak into source control.

Read the port from `process.env.PORT` with a fallback to a default using `||`. Remove the bare hardcoded `3000` literal assignment.
hints: `const port = process.env.PORT || 8080;` reads the env var and falls back.
